title: Catppuccin Dyes
body:
## What is it?
Catppuccin Dyes is an open-source (MIT licensed) mod that adds Catpuccin coloured dyes.

## What does it add?
- 14 colourful Catppucin colours
- Leather armour with the same colour

## What is planned?
- Banners
- Wool
- Catppucin crust, mantle, and base

[Catppuccin GitHub](https://github.com/catppuccin/)

[Catppuccin Website](https://catppuccin.com/)
